commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
# Dependencies
node_modules/
**/node_modules/

# Build output
dist/
**/dist/

# Environment variables
.env
.env.*
**/.env
**/.env.*
!.env.example
!**/.env.example

# Logs
*.log
npm-debug.log*
yarn-debug.log*
yarn-error.log*
pnpm-debug.log*

# Playwright
playwright-report/
test-results/
**/playwright-report/
**/test-results/

# Screenshots / debug
screenshots/*.png
screenshots/*.html
**/screenshots/*.png
**/screenshots/*.html
!screenshots/.gitkeep
!**/screenshots/.gitkeep

# Output files
output/*.csv
output/*.json
output/*.xlsx
**/output/*.csv
**/output/*.json
**/output/*.xlsx
!output/.gitkeep
!**/output/.gitkeep
